title: boronia crenulata subsp. obtusa
intro: Boronia crenulata subsp. obtusa, also known as Mountain Boronia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the mountainous regions of southeastern Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Mountain Boronia include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Mountain Boronia can be prepared as an essential oil, tea, or tincture, which can be used to promote relaxation, relieve stress, and boost the immune system.
